pundit.name: Alexi Lalas
pundit.take: **Ghost Pepper Devin, look at me. LOOK AT ME. Drafting Bosnia was like ordering a salad at a steakhouse.** Spain's 4-0 demolition of Mustard Boy Zach's Saudi Arabia should have been your ticket to glory, Devin, but now you're facing Bubba G's Senegal, a team that just defeated Egypt. Let me tell you something, Devin: your only hope lies with Norway, a squad armed with a Viking spirit but not much else. Meanwhile, Bubba G, your strategy of collecting African teams like they're Pokémon might just pay off as Senegal is set to run circles around Devin's bewildered Norwegians. Sure, Gunner, you're tied for first place now, but it doesn’t take a genius to bet on France. I predict Senegal will carve up Norway like a Thanksgiving turkey, taking Gunner closer to the top. Devin, if you lose this one, I'll send you a Bosnia jersey to wear as your scarlet letter of shame! Mic drop, people.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy's Austria Faces Tough Test Against Undrafted Argentina
pundit_takes.subtitle: Zach insists mustard is the secret ingredient for an upset.

pundit_takes.headline: Bubba G's France Set to Dominate Against Iraq in Philadelphia
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gunner claims he drafted France for their historical prowess, not baguettes.

pundit_takes.headline: Ghost Pepper's Norway Poised for Spicy Encounter with Bubba G's Senegal
pundit_takes.subtitle: Devin says he's just here for the cool jerseys and vibes.

pundit_takes.headline: Jordan's Chance for Redemption Against Algeria Amid WC Chaos
pundit_takes.subtitle: Backpass Assassin son Rafe hopes obscure drafting skills pay off.

rome_analytics_quotes: Gunner's unbeaten Morocco makes him king of the hill — sorry Dad, you're fifth.
Rafe's Tier-1 blues with Germany means his 38% dependency equals draft disaster.
Rafe vs. Devin: a one-sided beatdown with Rafe up 6-0 in points.
Sim's favorite Gunner is holding up despite Rafe's chaos — hit-and-miss predictions.
